title: TouHouThings/东方物品
description:
A mod add some things from Touhou Project.
一个增加了一些源自东方project的物品的mod
原作：上海爱丽丝幻乐团
body:
A mod add some things from Touhou Project.

To play this mod,you need:

·Minecraft Java 1.19.2

·Fabric API

What this mod added：

·Weapons:Gohei,Konpaku‘s sword,

·Tools:The pickaxe of Himemushi

·Danmaku system,let's made your own danmaku!

 ……and more!

Powered by Mcreator.

Disclaimer: This is a fan work based on Touhou Project. Touhou Project and its characters are the property of Team Shanghai Alice (ZUN).
